source_jobs.title: Forward Deployed Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Why Join Doppel

Doppel is building the future of social engineering defense. Our AI-native platform uses agentic AI to protect executives, employees, customers, and brands from phishing, impersonation, fraud, and other AI-powered threats across digital channels. We help some of the world’s most recognized brands detect and dismantle attacker infrastructure while strengthening employee resilience through threat-informed training and simulation. By unifying Digital Risk Protection, Human Risk Management and Email Security, Doppel connects threats into a real-time intelligence graph to power faster disruption, smarter defense, and modern security awareness at scale.

Backed by leading investors including Andreessen Horowitz and Bessemer Venture Partners, and trusted by leading enterprises, Doppel is a rapidly growing Series C startup building the future of social engineering defense. Our team combines deep cybersecurity expertise, operational rigor, and startup velocity to solve some of the internet’s most urgent trust and safety challenges.

What We're Building

We're building the AI-native social engineering defense platform.

This means we're designing scalable systems that monitor billions of domains, social media accounts, apps, dark web forums, etc., and leverage AI agents to identify and neutralize digital threats.

What You'll Do

We're looking for technically strong, product-minded engineers who enjoy working directly with customers to solve complex problems and rapidly build solutions that become part of the Doppel platform. The ideal candidate combines strong software engineering skills with customer empathy, product intuition, and the ability to execute independently in ambiguous environments.

 - Build customer-facing applications, workflows, and product capabilities that solve real enterprise problems.

 - Develop AI-powered automations and integrations for customers and internal teams.

 - Prototype and ship end-to-end solutions that can evolve into core product functionality.

 - Partner directly with enterprise customers to understand requirements and drive successful deployments.

 - Build and maintain integrations with APIs, webhooks, identity providers, SIEM/SOAR platforms, and other enterprise systems.

 - Troubleshoot authentication and enterprise integration issues (OAuth, SAML, SCIM, etc.).

 - Own multiple customer projects simultaneously, coordinating across engineering, product, and customer-facing teams.

 - Translate customer feedback into scalable product improvements.

 - Build internal tooling that accelerates onboarding, deployment, and operational workflows.

 - Create and maintain documentation, dashboards, and best practices for customer deployments and integrations.

What we’re looking for

 - Strong software engineering background with experience building production applications (Python preferred).

 - Familiarity with AI application development, LLM APIs, or workflow automation is a strong plus.

 - Comfortable working directly with enterprise and non technical customers to solve technical problems.

 - Strong understanding of enterprise authentication and integrations (OAuth, SAML, SCIM, webhooks, REST APIs).

 - Proven ability to manage multiple projects and stakeholders simultaneously.

 - Excellent communication and organizational skills, with the ability to bridge technical and non-technical teams.

 - Product-minded, highly autonomous, and comfortable working in a fast-paced startup environment.

What We Offer

🚀 A mission-driven culture with low ego, high ownership, deep customer obsession, and exceptional talent density

🍽️ Free lunch and dinner in the office

🌴 Flexible PTO

✈️ Quarterly team offsites




JOIN DOPPEL

Doppel is the first platform built to dismantle digital deception at scale. We scan over 150 billion entities daily and deploy continuously adaptive AI SOC agents, paired with expert human analysts, to uncover and disrupt the infrastructure behind phishing, impersonat

source_jobs.title: Software Engineer, Simulation
source_jobs.description:
Why Join Doppel

Doppel is building the future of social engineering defense. Our AI-native platform uses agentic AI to protect executives, employees, customers, and brands from phishing, impersonation, fraud, and other AI-powered threats across digital channels. We help some of the world’s most recognized brands detect and dismantle attacker infrastructure while strengthening employee resilience through threat-informed training and simulation. By unifying Digital Risk Protection, Human Risk Management and Email Security, Doppel connects threats into a real-time intelligence graph to power faster disruption, smarter defense, and modern security awareness at scale.

Backed by leading investors including Andreessen Horowitz and Bessemer Venture Partners, and trusted by leading enterprises, Doppel is a rapidly growing Series C startup building the future of social engineering defense. Our team combines deep cybersecurity expertise, operational rigor, and startup velocity to solve some of the internet’s most urgent trust and safety challenges.

What We're Building

We're building the AI-native social engineering defense platform.

This means we're designing scalable systems that monitor billions of domains, social media accounts, apps, dark web forums, etc., and leverage AI agents to identify and neutralize digital threats.

What We're Looking For

We’re looking for an experienced fullstack engineer to help build out our new Simulation product. Simulation is a small, fast-moving team inside Doppel (a series C company backed by Bessemer and a16z) building an entirely new product line, think of it as a startup within a startup. We crossed 6 figures within a few months of launching and are on track to hit 1M ARR in Q4.

Our mission: to help companies proactively defend against the next wave of social-engineering attacks. We’re creating AI-powered phishing simulations that use large-language models and voice synthesis to mimic real-world threats - from hyper-personalized emails to high-fidelity “manager calls” that test and train enterprise security teams.

You’ll be joining a team led by ex-Meta and YC founders, already working with Fortune 100 customers. It’s the rare mix of startup-level growth and creativity with established-company backing and stability. The perfect place to move fast, ship real impact, and help define an emerging category.

We only just recently launched it but market traction is growing extremely fast and we need people excited to jump and do whatever it takes to build what our customers desperately want. For example:

 - Build out a “Cursor for phishing simulation” flow that lets users create simulations using natural language..

 - Build out voice deepfakes that use AI to call employees pretending to be their co-worker.

Here are some additional resources on what we built https://www.doppel.com/blog/retire-the-phishing-test-doppel-simulation-is-here and why https://www.doppel.com/blog/founders-note-why-we-built-doppel-simulation.

What We Offer

🚀 A mission-driven culture with low ego, high ownership, deep customer obsession, and exceptional talent density

🍽️ Free lunch and dinner in the office

🌴 Flexible PTO

✈️ Quarterly team offsites




JOIN DOPPEL

Doppel is the first platform built to dismantle digital deception at scale. We scan over 150 billion entities daily and deploy continuously adaptive AI SOC agents, paired with expert human analysts, to uncover and disrupt the infrastructure behind phishing, impersonation, and online fraud before attacks can spread. Our Threat Grid turns every customer signal into shared intelligence, making each disruption smarter, faster, and more effective.



We’re not just another cybersecurity company. We’re defining the future of social engineering defense, where trust is protected, and deception becomes unprofitable. Backed by top-tier investors and trusted by some of the world’s most recognized brands, Doppel is growing fast. If you’re driven to solve real-world prob

source_jobs.title: Machine Learning Engineer, Detection (TOR)
source_jobs.description:
Why Join Doppel

Doppel is building the future of social engineering defense. Our AI-native platform uses agentic AI to protect executives, employees, customers, and brands from phishing, impersonation, fraud, and other AI-powered threats across digital channels. We help some of the world’s most recognized brands detect and dismantle attacker infrastructure while strengthening employee resilience through threat-informed training and simulation. By unifying Digital Risk Protection, Human Risk Management and Email Security, Doppel connects threats into a real-time intelligence graph to power faster disruption, smarter defense, and modern security awareness at scale.

Backed by leading investors including Andreessen Horowitz and Bessemer Venture Partners, and trusted by leading enterprises, Doppel is a rapidly growing Series C startup building the future of social engineering defense. Our team combines deep cybersecurity expertise, operational rigor, and startup velocity to solve some of the internet’s most urgent trust and safety challenges.

What We're Building

We're building the AI-native social engineering defense platform.

This means we're designing scalable systems that monitor billions of domains, social media accounts, apps, dark web forums, etc., and leverage AI agents to identify and neutralize digital threats.

What We're Looking For

We’re looking for a machine learning engineer to help build and scale the models and systems that power Doppel’s detection systems. Check out our blog post https://www.doppel.com/blog/battling-scams-at-scale-inside-doppels-high-throughput-ml-platform?utm_source=chatgpt.com on how we set up our ML platform. As an MLE at Doppel, you will

 - Design, train, and deploy models for both batch and real-time inference that identify malicious or infringing content across diverse data sources.

 - Partner closely with the Detection and Infrastructure teams to ensure our ML systems scale with the volume of web data we ingest

 - Work on problems that range from NLP and embeddings to similarity search, classification, and anomaly detection

 - Collaborate directly with customers and internal stakeholders to translate real-world threats into production ML systems

You may be a fit if you:

 - Have experience building and deploying ML systems in production environments

 - Are comfortable working with large-scale datasets and distributed data processing frameworks

 - Understand the trade-offs between research-quality models and production-ready systems

 - Are excited about solving real-world problems where the adversary is constantly evolving

What We Offer

🚀 A mission-driven culture with low ego, high ownership, deep customer obsession, and exceptional talent density

🍽️ Free lunch and dinner in the office

🌴 Flexible PTO

✈️ Quarterly team offsites

We’re not just another cybersecurity company. We’re defining the future of social engineering defense, where trust is protected, and deception becomes unprofitable. Backed by top-tier investors and trusted by some of the world’s most recognized brands, Doppel is growing fast. If you’re driven to solve real-world problems with bold technology, we’d love to meet you.

source_jobs.title: Email Security Architecture Manager
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT DOPPEL

Doppel is building the future of social engineering defense. Our AI-native platform uses agentic AI to protect executives, employees, customers, and brands from phishing, impersonation, fraud, and other AI-powered threats across digital channels. We help some of the world’s most recognized brands detect and dismantle attacker infrastructure while strengthening employee resilience through threat-informed training and simulation. By unifying Digital Risk Protection, Human Risk Management and Email Security, Doppel connects threats into a real-time intelligence graph to power faster disruption, smarter defense, and modern security awareness at scale.

Backed by leading investors including Andreessen Horowitz and Bessemer Venture Partners, and trusted by leading enterprises, Doppel is a rapidly growing Series C startup building the future of social engineering defense. Our team combines deep cybersecurity expertise, operational rigor, and startup velocity to solve some of the internet’s most urgent trust and safety challenges.


THE ROLE

As the Manager, Email Security Architecture, you will lead a team of Email Security Architects responsible for customer onboarding, detection tuning, operational excellence, threat investigation, and strategic customer guidance.

This is a highly cross-functional leadership role that sits at the intersection of security operations, customer success, solutions architecture, product, and engineering. You will help define how customers deploy and operationalize Doppel Email Security while serving as a critical feedback loop between the field and our product organization.

You will be responsible for building scalable processes, developing team talent, driving customer outcomes, and helping shape the future direction of Doppel's Email Security platform.


WHAT YOU'LL DO


TEAM LEADERSHIP & OPERATIONS

 - Build, mentor, and lead a team of Email Security Architects.

 - Establish operational processes, performance standards, and best practices across the team.

 - Develop onboarding, enablement, and career development programs.

 - Manage team capacity, escalations, and customer coverage models.

 - Drive operational metrics around customer adoption, time-to-value, remediation outcomes, and customer satisfaction.

 - Build a high-performance culture focused on customer outcomes, operational excellence, and continuous improvement.


CUSTOMER SECURITY LEADERSHIP

 - Serve as an executive escalation point for strategic customers.

 - Guide customers through Email Security deployments and operationalization.

 - Help customers improve their defenses against phishing, business email compromise (BEC), impersonation, account takeover, and other social engineering threats.

 - Lead security reviews, threat discussions, and executive-level customer presentations.

 - Partner with customer security, messaging, and IT teams to integrate Doppel into existing workflows.

 - Act as a trusted advisor to security leaders responsible for protecting their organizations from evolving email-borne threats.


THREAT OPERATIONS & RESPONSE

 - Oversee investigations involving phishing campaigns, impersonation attacks, malicious infrastructure, and emerging threat activity.

 - Help define operational playbooks for investigation, remediation, and disruption.

 - Partner with internal enforcement and takedown teams to connect inbox threats with broader attacker infrastructure and disruption opportunities.

 - Drive continuous improvement of detection, investigation, and response workflows.

 - Help operationalize the connection between inbox threats and Doppel's broader threat intelligence and disruption capabilities.


PRODUCT & ENGINEERING PARTNERSHIP

 - Act as the primary voice of customers and frontline operations for the Email Security product team.

 - Identify detection gaps, workflow friction, automation opportunities, and platform enhancements.

 - Partner closely with Product Management and Engineering

source_jobs.description:
Why Join Doppel

Doppel is building the future of social engineering defense. Our AI-native platform uses agentic AI to protect executives, employees, customers, and brands from phishing, impersonation, fraud, and other AI-powered threats across digital channels. Backed by leading investors including Andreessen Horowitz and Bessemer Venture Partners, and trusted by leading enterprises, Doppel is a rapidly growing Series C startup building the future of social engineering defense. Our team combines deep cybersecurity expertise, operational rigor, and startup velocity to solve some of the internet’s most urgent trust and safety challenges.

What We're Building

We're building the AI-native social engineering defense platform.

This means we're designing scalable systems that monitor billions of domains, social media accounts, apps, dark web forums, etc., and leverage AI agents to identify and neutralize digital threats.

What We're Looking For

We’re looking for an experienced backend engineer to build out the infrastructure required to rapidly scale up our engineering organization. A few examples of the work we’ve done recently:

 - Built a scalable data platform with a robust DBT transformation layer, enabling customers, engineers, and analysts to reliably model and query large-scale event data, track key product metrics, and power customer facing analytics.

 - Launched a flexible notification system, delivering timely, reliable alerts across Slack, email, and other channels for internal and customer-facing use cases.

 - Standardized core service patterns and shared business logic (auth, persistence, messaging), scaling them into reusable services that reduce duplication, ensure consistency, and enable product engineers to move faster as the company grows.

What We Offer

🚀 A mission-driven culture with low ego, high ownership, deep customer obsession, and exceptional talent density

🍽️ Free lunch and dinner in the office

🌴 Flexible PTO

✈️ Quarterly team offsites

source_jobs.title: Software Engineer, Autopilot
source_jobs.description:
Why Join Doppel

Doppel is building the future of social engineering defense. Our AI-native platform uses agentic AI to protect executives, employees, customers, and brands from phishing, impersonation, fraud, and other AI-powered threats across digital channels. We help some of the world’s most recognized brands detect and dismantle attacker infrastructure while strengthening employee resilience through threat-informed training and simulation. Backed by leading investors including Andreessen Horowitz and Bessemer Venture Partners, and trusted by leading enterprises, Doppel is a rapidly growing Series C startup building the future of social engineering defense. Our team combines deep cybersecurity expertise, operational rigor, and startup velocity to solve some of the internet’s most urgent trust and safety challenges.

What We're Building

We're building the AI-native social engineering defense platform.

This means we're designing scalable systems that monitor billions of domains, social media accounts, apps, dark web forums, etc., and leverage AI agents to identify and neutralize digital threats.

What We're Looking For

We’re looking for an experienced backend engineer to build and scale an automated system to manage a variety of Security Analyst tasks. We aim to verify and neutralize threats in minutes using AI-driven automation. A few examples of the work we’ve done recently:

 - Built a sophisticated LLM engine to reduce verification workloads by 4x for the highest volume product line, which will enable faster takedowns at scale

 - Built a QA & data labeling tool to close the feedback loop with human analysts, ML models, and LLM agents

As part of our SF team (in-office min 3x/week), you’ll:

 - Play a critical role in building systems that protect billions of people from AI-generated scams and general digital harm

 - Have complete end to end ownership - from directly collecting product requirements to continuously evaluating and iterating on shipped releases

 - Mentor junior engineers, foster a high-performing team culture, and shape the team roadmap

 - Enjoy monthly in-person dinners, happy hours, and social activities (Exploratorium, Valkyries game, etc.)

What We Offer

🚀 A mission-driven culture with low ego, high ownership, deep customer obsession, and exceptional talent density

🍽️ Free lunch and dinner in the office

🌴 Flexible PTO

✈️ Quarterly team offsites

source_jobs.title: Software Engineer, Detection
source_jobs.description:
Why Join Doppel

Doppel is building the future of social engineering defense. Our AI-native platform uses agentic AI to protect executives, employees, customers, and brands from phishing, impersonation, fraud, and other AI-powered threats across digital channels. We help some of the world’s most recognized brands detect and dismantle attacker infrastructure while strengthening employee resilience through threat-informed training and simulation. By unifying Digital Risk Protection, Human Risk Management and Email Security, Doppel connects threats into a real-time intelligence graph to power faster disruption, smarter defense, and modern security awareness at scale.

Backed by leading investors including Andreessen Horowitz and Bessemer Venture Partners, and trusted by leading enterprises, Doppel is a rapidly growing Series C startup building the future of social engineering defense. Our team combines deep cybersecurity expertise, operational rigor, and startup velocity to solve some of the internet’s most urgent trust and safety challenges.

What We're Building

We're building the AI-native social engineering defense platform.

This means we're designing scalable systems that monitor billions of domains, social media accounts, apps, dark web forums, etc., and leverage AI agents to identify and neutralize digital threats.

What We're Looking For

We’re looking for passionate engineers who love building and operating backend systems at scale - someone who can take ambiguous detection/product problems and deliver reliable production services and UIs that help our ops and customers find and remediate threats. You’ll focus on high-throughput ingestion, enrichment, scoring and alerting pipelines, APIs and dashboards, threat-linking infrastructure, and reliable automation that the stakeholder teams use every day.

 - Hands-on experience building production backend services or full-stack features (or equivalent). Proven record of shipping end-to-end: design → implementation → testing → monitoring → oncall.

 - Strong mastery of at least one backend language (Python, Go, Java, or Node) and comfort with web APIs, async processing, and service frameworks.

 - Solid system design skills: experience architecting scalable, fault-tolerant systems (sharding, caching, queueing, idempotency, backpressure).

 - Experience building and operating large data pipelines (batch or streaming), working with warehouses or OLAP systems for analytics, and designing efficient schemas for scale.

 - Deep practical experience with backend concerns: databases (SQL + NoSQL), caching, message queues, rate limiting, retries, and cost/latency tradeoffs.

 - Strong observability, debugging and incident response skills: structured logging, tracing, dashboards, SLOs/alerts, and the ability to triage and fix production issues.

 - Product ownership and excellent cross-functional communication — you’ll collaborate with Operations, Customer Success, Sales, to deliver measurable outcomes.



As part of our NY team, you’ll:

 - Work on a wide range of asks that protect billions of people from digital impersonation

 - Have complete end to end ownership - from directly collecting customer requirements to continuously iterating on shipped releases.

 - Mentor junior engineers, make key product decisions, and foster a high-performing team culture



What We Offer

🚀 A mission-driven culture with low ego, high ownership, deep customer obsession, and exceptional talent density

🍽️ Free lunch and dinner in the office

🌴 Flexible PTO

✈️ Quarterly team offsites

source_jobs.title: Software Engineer, Infrastructure
source_jobs.description:
Why Join Doppel

Doppel is building the future of social engineering defense. Our AI-native platform uses agentic AI to protect executives, employees, customers, and brands from phishing, impersonation, fraud, and other AI-powered threats across digital channels. We help some of the world’s most recognized brands detect and dismantle attacker infrastructure while strengthening employee resilience through threat-informed training and simulation. By unifying Digital Risk Protection, Human Risk Management and Email Security, Doppel connects threats into a real-time intelligence graph to power faster disruption, smarter defense, and modern security awareness at scale.

Backed by leading investors including Andreessen Horowitz and Bessemer Venture Partners, and trusted by leading enterprises, Doppel is a rapidly growing Series C startup building the future of social engineering defense. Our team combines deep cybersecurity expertise, operational rigor, and startup velocity to solve some of the internet’s most urgent trust and safety challenges.

What We're Building

We're building the AI-native social engineering defense platform.

This means we're designing scalable systems that monitor billions of domains, social media accounts, apps, dark web forums, etc., and leverage AI agents to identify and neutralize digital threats.

What We're Looking For

We’re looking for an experienced backend engineer to build out the infrastructure required to rapidly scale up our engineering organization. A few examples of the work we’ve done recently:

 - Built self-hosted Elasticsearch infrastructure on Kubernetes, enabling real-time search across millions of alerts and associated metadata.

 - Defined core infrastructure using Terraform (IaC), allowing reproducible, version-controlled environments and faster onboarding for new engineers.

 - Stood up a dedicated staging environment, enabling safer releases, feature validation, and automated integration testing before production rollouts.

 - Introduced observability and tracing (metrics, logging, distributed tracing), improving our ability to debug performance issues and maintain reliability at scale.

What We Offer

🚀 A mission-driven culture with low ego, high ownership, deep customer obsession, and exceptional talent density

🍽️ Free lunch and dinner in the office

🌴 Flexible PTO

✈️ Quarterly team offsites




JOIN DOPPEL

Doppel is the first platform built to dismantle digital deception at scale. We scan over 150 billion entities daily and deploy continuously adaptive AI SOC agents, paired with expert human analysts, to uncover and disrupt the infrastructure behind phishing, impersonation, and online fraud before attacks can spread. Our Threat Grid turns every customer signal into shared intelligence, making each disruption smarter, faster, and more effective.



We’re not just another cybersecurity company. We’re defining the future of social engineering defense, where trust is protected, and deception becomes unprofitable. Backed by top-tier investors and trusted by some of the world’s most recognized brands, Doppel is growing fast. If you’re driven to solve real-world problems with bold technology, we’d love to meet you.

source_jobs.title: Forward Deployed Engineer (Remote)
source_jobs.description:
Why Join Doppel

Doppel is building the future of social engineering defense. Our AI-native platform uses agentic AI to protect executives, employees, customers, and brands from phishing, impersonation, fraud, and other AI-powered threats across digital channels. We help some of the world’s most recognized brands detect and dismantle attacker infrastructure while strengthening employee resilience through threat-informed training and simulation. By unifying Digital Risk Protection, Human Risk Management and Email Security, Doppel connects threats into a real-time intelligence graph to power faster disruption, smarter defense, and modern security awareness at scale.

Backed by leading investors including Andreessen Horowitz and Bessemer Venture Partners, and trusted by leading enterprises, Doppel is a rapidly growing Series C startup building the future of social engineering defense. Our team combines deep cybersecurity expertise, operational rigor, and startup velocity to solve some of the internet’s most urgent trust and safety challenges.

What We're Building

We're building the AI-native social engineering defense platform.

This means we're designing scalable systems that monitor billions of domains, social media accounts, apps, dark web forums, etc., and leverage AI agents to identify and neutralize digital threats.

What You'll Do

We're looking for technically strong, product-minded engineers who enjoy working directly with customers to solve complex problems and rapidly build solutions that become part of the Doppel platform. The ideal candidate combines strong software engineering skills with customer empathy, product intuition, and the ability to execute independently in ambiguous environments.

 - Build customer-facing applications, workflows, and product capabilities that solve real enterprise problems.

 - Develop AI-powered automations and integrations for customers and internal teams.

 - Prototype and ship end-to-end solutions that can evolve into core product functionality.

 - Partner directly with enterprise customers to understand requirements and drive successful deployments.

 - Build and maintain integrations with APIs, webhooks, identity providers, SIEM/SOAR platforms, and other enterprise systems.

 - Troubleshoot authentication and enterprise integration issues (OAuth, SAML, SCIM, etc.).

 - Own multiple customer projects simultaneously, coordinating across engineering, product, and customer-facing teams.

 - Translate customer feedback into scalable product improvements.

 - Build internal tooling that accelerates onboarding, deployment, and operational workflows.

 - Create and maintain documentation, dashboards, and best practices for customer deployments and integrations.

What we’re looking for

 - Strong software engineering background with experience building production applications (Python preferred).

 - Familiarity with AI application development, LLM APIs, or workflow automation is a strong plus.

 - Comfortable working directly with enterprise and non technical customers to solve technical problems.

 - Strong understanding of enterprise authentication and integrations (OAuth, SAML, SCIM, webhooks, REST APIs).

 - Proven ability to manage multiple projects and stakeholders simultaneously.

 - Excellent communication and organizational skills, with the ability to bridge technical and non-technical teams.

 - Product-minded, highly autonomous, and comfortable working in a fast-paced startup environment.

What We Offer

🚀 A mission-driven culture with low ego, high ownership, deep customer obsession, and exceptional talent density

🍽️ Free lunch and dinner in the office

🌴 Flexible PTO

✈️ Quarterly team offsites

source_jobs.title: Software Engineer, Simulation
source_jobs.description:
Why Join Doppel

Doppel is building the future of social engineering defense. Our AI-native platform uses agentic AI to protect executives, employees, customers, and brands from phishing, impersonation, fraud, and other AI-powered threats across digital channels. We help some of the world’s most recognized brands detect and dismantle attacker infrastructure while strengthening employee resilience through threat-informed training and simulation. By unifying Digital Risk Protection, Human Risk Management and Email Security, Doppel connects threats into a real-time intelligence graph to power faster disruption, smarter defense, and modern security awareness at scale.

Backed by leading investors including Andreessen Horowitz and Bessemer Venture Partners, and trusted by leading enterprises, Doppel is a rapidly growing Series C startup building the future of social engineering defense. Our team combines deep cybersecurity expertise, operational rigor, and startup velocity to solve some of the internet’s most urgent trust and safety challenges.

What We're Building

We're building the AI-native social engineering defense platform.

This means we're designing scalable systems that monitor billions of domains, social media accounts, apps, dark web forums, etc., and leverage AI agents to identify and neutralize digital threats.

What We're Looking For

We’re looking for an experienced fullstack engineer to help build out our new Simulation product. Simulation is a small, fast-moving team inside Doppel (a series C company backed by Bessemer and a16z) building an entirely new product line, think of it as a startup within a startup. We crossed 6 figures within a few months of launching and are on track to hit 1M ARR in Q4.

Our mission: to help companies proactively defend against the next wave of social-engineering attacks. We’re creating AI-powered phishing simulations that use large-language models and voice synthesis to mimic real-world threats - from hyper-personalized emails to high-fidelity “manager calls” that test and train enterprise security teams.

You’ll be joining a team led by ex-Meta and YC founders, already working with Fortune 100 customers. It’s the rare mix of startup-level growth and creativity with established-company backing and stability. The perfect place to move fast, ship real impact, and help define an emerging category.

We only just recently launched it but market traction is growing extremely fast and we need people excited to jump and do whatever it takes to build what our customers desperately want. For example:

 - Build out a “Cursor for phishing simulation” flow that lets users create simulations using natural language..

 - Build out voice deepfakes that use AI to call employees pretending to be their co-worker.

Here are some additional resources on what we built https://www.doppel.com/blog/retire-the-phishing-test-doppel-simulation-is-here and why https://www.doppel.com/blog/founders-note-why-we-built-doppel-simulation.

What We Offer

🚀 A mission-driven culture with low ego, high ownership, deep customer obsession, and exceptional talent density

🍽️ Free lunch and dinner in the office

🌴 Flexible PTO

✈️ Quarterly team offsites

source_jobs.title: Workflow Operations Manager - Labeling
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT DOPPEL

Doppel is building the future of social engineering defense. Our AI-native platform uses agentic AI to protect executives, employees, customers, and brands from phishing, impersonation, fraud, and other AI-powered threats across digital channels. We help some of the world’s most recognized brands detect and dismantle attacker infrastructure while strengthening employee resilience through threat-informed training and simulation. By unifying Digital Risk Protection, Human Risk Management and Email Security, Doppel connects threats into a real-time intelligence graph to power faster disruption, smarter defense, and modern security awareness at scale.

Backed by leading investors including Andreessen Horowitz and Bessemer Venture Partners, and trusted by leading enterprises, Doppel is a rapidly growing Series C startup building the future of social engineering defense. Our team combines deep cybersecurity expertise, operational rigor, and startup velocity to solve some of the internet’s most urgent trust and safety challenges.


THE ROLE

Doppel is looking for an experienced operational leader to oversee two of the company’s most strategically important organizations: LLM Labeling and Workflow Operations.

This leader will be responsible for building and scaling the human intelligence layer that powers Doppel’s products, automation systems, and customer outcomes. They will oversee the teams responsible for alert triage, operational decision-making, data labeling, quality assurance, and the continuous refinement of the datasets and operational processes that enable Doppel to automate at scale.




WHAT YOU WILL DO

• Lead the LLM Labeling team and Workflow Operations team.

• Oversee alert triage, operational decision-making, data labeling, quality assurance, queue management, prioritization, and escalation handling.

• Build and refine datasets, taxonomies, workflows, review processes, and operational systems.

• Partner with Operations, Product, Engineering, Detection, AI, Customer Success, Sales, and Solutions Architecture.

• Identify opportunities for automation, AI-assisted decision-making, and operational simplification.

• Help define what should remain human-reviewed, what should become machine-assisted, and what can become fully automated over time.

• Translate frontline operational knowledge into product requirements, automation opportunities, and scalable systems.

• Support pre-sale and post-sale customer conversations around Doppel’s operational model, automation strategy, workflows, labeling methodologies, and efficiency roadmap.




WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR

• Experience as an operational leader.

• Experience building and scaling operational programs.

• Experience with labeling, workflow operations, quality assurance, alert triage, queue management, escalation handling, or operational decision-making.

• Ability to work across Operations, Product, Engineering, Detection, AI, Customer Success, Sales, and Solutions Architecture.

• Ability to operate in both operational and technical environments.

• Ability to engage with executive customers and both technical and non-technical audiences.

• Ability to create a culture of continuous improvement, experimentation, and operational rigor.




WHY JOIN DOPPEL

 - Meaningful equity so you share in Doppel’s success

 - Remote first culture with flexibility built in

 - Flexible PTO, comprehensive health benefits, parental leave, and more

 - A high growth environment where your work has immediate impact and visibility

source_jobs.title: Content Developer
source_jobs.description:
Why Join Doppel

Doppel is building the future of social engineering defense. Our AI-native platform uses agentic AI to protect executives, employees, customers, and brands from phishing, impersonation, fraud, and other AI-powered threats across digital channels. We help some of the world’s most recognized brands detect and dismantle attacker infrastructure while strengthening employee resilience through threat-informed training and simulation. By unifying Digital Risk Protection, Human Risk Management and Email Security, Doppel connects threats into a real-time intelligence graph to power faster disruption, smarter defense, and modern security awareness at scale.

Backed by leading investors including Andreessen Horowitz and Bessemer Venture Partners, and trusted by leading enterprises, Doppel is a rapidly growing Series C startup building the future of social engineering defense. Our team combines deep cybersecurity expertise, operational rigor, and startup velocity to solve some of the internet’s most urgent trust and safety challenges.

What We're Looking For

We’re looking for a creative, AI-forward Learning Experience Designer / Content Developer to help us build engaging, realistic, threat-informed training experiences.

This role is ideal for a learning developer, instructional designer, or content creator who wants room to get creative with training;someone who can turn complex security concepts into interactive, memorable, behavior-changing learning experiences. You’ll design learning that goes beyond passive content: realistic scenarios, meaningful choices, branching interactions, gamification, simulations, video, animation, and AI-enhanced learning experiences.

You are excited by AI, not intimidated by it. You see AI as a way to prototype faster, generate better ideas, improve workflows, and create more engaging learning products. You are curious, experimental, and eager to push what digital learning can look like.

What We're Looking For

 - Design realistic, threat-informed training that helps learners recognize risks, make decisions, and change behavior.

 - Own learning content end-to-end, from needs analysis and objectives to writing, development, revision, and delivery.

 - Create engaging written modules, interactive scenarios, branching activities, knowledge checks, simulations, and multimedia learning assets.

 - Build learning experiences in Articulate Storyline and other content development tools.

 - Use gamification, learner choice, storytelling, and scenario-based design to make training more active and memorable.

 - Conduct learning needs assessments and analyze training requirements to determine the right learning solution.

 - Apply action mapping and learning outcome-driven design to connect training to real performance goals.

 - Experiment with AI tools for ideation, content drafting, prototyping, scenario generation, media creation, assessment design, and learner engagement.

 - Partner with subject matter experts, product, security, and creative teams to turn complex ideas into clear learning experiences.

 - Create or collaborate on video, animation, visuals, interactive media, and other content formats.

 - Continuously improve learning experiences based on feedback, learner needs, quality standards, and performance goals.

Role Requirements

 - Strong experience in instructional design, learning experience design, or eLearning content development.

 - Advanced skills in Articulate Storyline; experience with Rise or the broader Articulate 360 suite is a plus.

 - Strong understanding of adult learning principles, learning objectives, and outcome-driven design.

 - Experience creating scenario-based, interactive, and gamified learning experiences.

 - Ability to write clear, engaging instructional content that supports behavior change.

 - Experience using AI tools such as ChatGPT, Claude, ElevenLabs, Synthesia, or other creative AI platforms.

 - Experience conducting learning needs assess

notes: Highly technical job postings with a focus on AI and machine learning. No explicit mention of sponsorship or clearance requirements.
